name: team-task-manager
description: Interview-ready collaborative team task manager built with Next.js, Express, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace apps/backend & npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/backend && npm run build --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/frontend
